{"code":"(def incidents (pagerduty__list_incidents {}))
(def triggered-high (filter #(and (= (:status %) "triggered") (= (:urgency %) "high")) incidents))
(def high-count (count triggered-high))
(if (empty? triggered-high)
  (do (slack__post_message {:channel "incidents" :text "All clear."})
